Costco Wholesale Opens First Business Centre in Manitoba
data.description:
Costco Wholesale opened its eleventh Canadian Business Centre, marking the first in Manitoba. Located at the site of the former 1315 St. James St warehouse, the 137,000 square-foot facility is a conversion of the original Costco Winnipeg, which recently relocated to 4077 Portage Avenue W. The new Business Centre has created 190 local jobs and offers unprecedented convenience for local businesses.

The Business Centre concept is open to ALL Costco members. It is vastly different from a traditional Costco warehouse, as more than 70 % of the product offerings are unique to the Business Centre, targeting the needs of businesses of all sizes, including restaurants, offices, and convenience stores. The new Winnipeg Costco Business Centre offers thousands of high-quality, business-specific items in industrial-sized quantities.

Items are targeted at restaurants, convenience/grocery stores, and offices, ranging from professional kitchenware to expanded grocery and office supplies. A full-service Costco Pharmacy is also available at this location, with operating hours that match the warehouse's business-friendly schedule. The facility includes a large cooler at 14,000 square feet and an indoor loading area.

A dedicated next-day delivery service is available inside a designated delivery zone across the city, utilizing a fleet of 6 trucks. Business-friendly hours are Monday to Saturday from 7 a.m. to 7 p.m., and Sunday from 9 a.m. to 7 p.m. Opening week promotions at the Winnipeg Business Centre feature substantial savings, including $110 off a Eurodib single heavy-duty induction cooker, $40 off per unit of Canada ungraded beef tenderloin, and $30 off a Sagetra 3-tier wire basket cart. Members can also find a number of exclusive items available only at this location, such as a 208 L barrel of Terra Delyssa Extra Virgin Olive Oil, a full wheel of 13-month aged Parmigiano Reggiano cheese, and local favourites like a 11.4 L tub of Prairie West ice cream in various flavours and a 24 x 473 mL case of Farmery Craft Soda.

Costco Wholesale provides a wide range of products and services for members? personal use and helps businesses from small to large save money on both supplies and items for resale. Costco Wholesale Business Centres are open to ALL Costco members.

Industrial and Commercial Bank of China Limited Reports Earnings Results for the Full Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description:
Industrial and Commercial Bank of China Limited reported earnings results for the full year ended December 31, 2025. For the full year, the company reported net interest income was CNY 635,126 million compared to CNY 637,405 million a year ago. Net income was CNY 368,562 million compared to CNY 365,863 million a year ago.

Basic earnings per share from continuing operations was CNY 1 compared to CNY 0.98 a year ago. Diluted earnings per share from continuing operations was CNY 1 compared to CNY 0.98 a year ago.

data.title: ENN Energy Holdings Limited Reports Earnings Results for the Full Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description:
ENN Energy Holdings Limited reported earnings results for the full year ended December 31, 2025. For the full year, the company reported sales was CNY 111,905 million compared to CNY 109,853 million a year ago. Net income was CNY 5,904 million compared to CNY 5,987 million a year ago.

Basic earnings per share from continuing operations was CNY 5.31 compared to CNY 5.35 a year ago. Diluted earnings per share from continuing operations was CNY 5.31 compared to CNY 5.35 a year ago.

Nestle pushes ahead with about $5.75 billion Perrier and San Pellegrino deal, FT reports
data.description:
March 27 (Reuters) - Nestle's sale of a multibillion euro stake in its water business has moved forward, with private equity firms CD&R, KKR and PAI advancing to the next round of bidding for a 50% stake that could value the business at about 5 billion euros ($5.75 billion), the Financial Times reported on Friday.

Platinum Equity has also expressed interest in the deal, the report said, citing people familiar with the matter.

Reuters could not immediately verify the report.

($1 = 0.8693 euros)

(Reporting by Bipasha Dey in Bengaluru; Editing by Shreya Biswas)

SAP to Buy Data-Management Software Provider Reltio
data.description:
By Mauro Orru


SAP said it had struck an agreement to acquire U.S. data-management software provider Reltio, moving to further embed artificial intelligence in its operations.

The German business-software group said the deal would provide customers with tools to unify, cleanse and harmonize their data, leveraging Reltio's platform to help organizations manage and govern structured and unstructured enterprise data.

It didn't disclose financial details for the transaction, which is expected to close in the second or third quarter.


Write to Mauro Orru at mauro.orru@wsj.com


(END) Dow Jones Newswires

03-27-26 0836ET

EQT hit with sell rating as AI pressures software valuations
data.description:
Private equity firm EQT has received a rare sell recommendation amid concerns that artificial intelligence is weighing on software valuations and, consequently, earnings, Bloomberg News reports.

Autonomous analyst Isobel Hettrick has downgraded the stock to underperform from neutral, slashing the price target by 32 percent.

EQT is estimated to have the highest exposure to software investments among the firms covered by Autonomous. Meanwhile, forecasts for carried interest and investment income for 2026–2028 are considered to be approximately 24 percent too high.

The stock is down 4.4 percent on Friday and has declined roughly 24 percent year-to-date, tracking a broader downturn in the software sector.
